channel.title: Yorkshire Theatre & Arts Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events in the Theatre & Arts category.

item.title: Address
item.description: Bolling Hall Museum is marking 110 years with new photo displays from the 1870s–1880s and its 1912–1915 restoration, plus objects linked to its past, including a sword, a book from the garderobe and the 1915 opening key.
item.location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.ify:location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: BD: Walls is an ambitious exhibition with a difference: the gallery is Bradford District itself.
item.location: New works on walls across Bradford District, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: New works on walls across Bradford District, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Scarborough 400 - Maritime Heritage Centre
item.description: A special exhibition explaining the past 400 years of Scarborough Spa and the town.
item.location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.ify:location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Botanically Beautiful: Art and design inspired by nature
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Askrigg Studios – well known Dales artists, Judith Bromley and Robert Nicholls
item.description: We welcome you into our home to view our paintings and prints, books and greetings cards. Open most Wednesdays 10.00am to 5.00 pm from Easter to Christmas If making a […] \n
item.location: Beech House, Askrigg, Leyburn, DL8 3HG
item.ify:location: Beech House, Askrigg, Leyburn, DL8 3HG
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Dales National Park

item.title: Address
item.description: Step into the imaginative world of Jim Moir, the celebrated British artist, AKA Vic Reeves at Cartwright Hall, Bradford.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Cartwright Hall, artworks by twelve South Asian artists highlight shared environmental, social and historical realities.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Cartwright Hall, this exhibition pairs contemporary artist film from the Art Jameel collection with a complementary display of Islamic calligraphy from Bradford District Museums & Galleries.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Several of the largest paintings in Bradford’s collection are brought together in The Big Picture at Cartwright Hall, a display spanning more than two centuries of art.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Cartwright Hall Art Gallery presents a selection of works from Bradford District Museums & Galleries’ Pre‑Raphaelite collection.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Family Friendly
item.description: We’ve put together a busy schedule of events for all ages, covering arts and culture, live events in Doncaster, sport, shopping, eating, and drinking.
item.location: coming back for more. Doncaster really does have it all! Tourist Information Centre 1 Priory Place Doncaster DN1 1BL
item.ify:location: coming back for more. Doncaster really does have it all! Tourist Information Centre 1 Priory Place Doncaster DN1 1BL

item.title: Address
item.description: Following its success in 2025, Extraordinary Portraits with Bill Bailey returns to The Loading Bay in Bradford. All six original artworks from the hit BBC One series will be on display at this free exhibition.
item.location: Loading Bay, 1 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.ify:location: Loading Bay, 1 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Bradford Industrial Museum, Made by Many Hands highlights local craft traditions inspired by the Heritage Crafts list and is accompanied by workshops and events across the site.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Eccleshill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Eccleshill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Cartwright Hall, this exhibition revisits the 1904 Great Exhibition by centring the Somali Village and its colonial context.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS

item.title: Address
item.description: Celebrating 70 years of Eurovision at the National Science and Media Museum. Go behind the sequins of the world’s largest live music event and discover how the magic really happens.
item.location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.ify:location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: The Football Art Prize
item.description: The Football Art Prize makes a welcome return to Sheffield to celebrate the passion, drama and unity the beautiful game inspires around the globe.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.description: A new exhibition at the Bradford Police Museum

item.title: Cells Talks – Mon 22 Jun 2026
item.description: Dates: Monday 22 June 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, All Day Venue: York Castle Museum
item.location: York Castle Museum Cells Talks Daily 11.30am and 2.30pm Included in general admission Discover the history of York Castle prison and some of its notorious inmates. View event >
item.ify:location: York Castle Museum Cells Talks Daily 11.30am and 2.30pm Included in general admission Discover the history of York Castle prison and some of its notorious inmates. View event >
item.dc:creator: York Museums Trust

item.title: Sheffield Cablevision
item.description: Free Exhibition about the local Sheffield TV Station (1973-76). Kids shows, sports shows, politics, music, comedy and more. Rare archive footage, photos, objects inside.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Retro Games and Toys – Tue 7 Jul 2026
item.description: Dates: Tuesday 7 July 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, 10:30 am-5:00 pm Venue: York Castle Museum

item.title: Summer Holidays @ The Craft Cabin
item.description: Get creative this summer holidays at the Craft Cabin at Wentworth Woodhouse! From seasonal crafts to hands-on activities for all ages, this is the perfect way to spend a relaxed summer afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Together We Play: All Summer at The National Videogame Museum
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.description: Unleash your inner pop star over the summer holidays with creative activities for all ages at the National Science and Media Museum.

item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Summer Holidays - Ampleforth Adventures
item.description: join us this summer to reconnect with nature and enjoy the simple things in life - fresh air and room to play.

item.title: Draw and Discover – Sat 18 Jul 2026
item.description: Dates: Saturday 18 July 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, 10:00 am-4:30 pm Venue: York Art Gallery
item.location: budding artists can collect materials to draw and sketch with during their visit, using the artwork on display as inspiration for their own masterpieces. Collect materials from the foyer and get creative! View event >
item.ify:location: budding artists can collect materials to draw and sketch with during their visit, using the artwork on display as inspiration for their own masterpieces. Collect materials from the foyer and get creative! View event >
item.dc:creator: York Museums Trust

item.title: Address
item.description: The boys are coming back to the Alhambra Theatre.
item.location: Alhambra Theatre, Morley Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD7 1AJ
item.ify:location: Alhambra Theatre, Morley Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD7 1AJ
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Summer Holiday Activities at Sheffield Manor Lodge – Week 1
item.description: Come along to Sheffield Manor Lodge during the first week of the summer holidays and enjoy fun garden-themed craft and trail activities!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Matthew Bourne's The Car Man
item.description: Fasten your seat belts. Matthew Bourne’s award-winning The Car Man is back! Loosely based on Bizet’s ever-popular opera, The Car Man has one of the most thrilling and instantly recognisable scores in New Adventures’ repertoire.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Free Summer Crafting
item.description: Free Summer Crafting Join us for our free drop-in Summer Crafting Sessions on The Courtyard EVERY TUESDAY AND THURSDAY! From 11-2, our wonderful team of volunteers will be on hand to help you create some exciting summer crafts. Sessions will run every Tuesday and Thursday throughout the summer holidays except for Thurs
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: 400 Reasons - The Rotunda Museum
item.description: Celebrate Scarborough 400 with us! Share your creativity and tell us why you love Scarborough through poems and drawings. Your work could be selected for…
item.location: The Rotunda Museum, The Rotunda Museum, Vernon Road, Scarborough, YO11 2PS
item.ify:location: The Rotunda Museum, The Rotunda Museum, Vernon Road, Scarborough, YO11 2PS

item.title: Summer of Play: Tansy beetle day
item.description: Meet one of Beningbrough’s rarest residents - the tansy beetle!
item.location: Beningbrough, York, North Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Beningbrough, York, North Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: ​Pokémon joins Fountains Abbey’s Summer of Play
item.description: Planning your summer holidays? Discover a Summer of Play supported by Pokémon. Plus, don't miss the Pokémon TCG Mega Evolution play zones... ​
item.location: Fountains Abbey and Studley Royal Water Garden, Ripon, North Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Fountains Abbey and Studley Royal Water Garden, Ripon, North Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Summer of Play at Wentworth Castle Gardens
item.description: Summer of Play is back! Join us for another adventure-filled summer, every day throughout the holidays. With a fairytale castle, secret gardens and plenty of space to explore, Wentworth Castle Gardens is the perfect setting for your Summer of Play.
item.location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire

item.title: Summer River Workshops at Rowntree Park
item.description: Join sculptor and ceramicist Sarah Schiewe for a creative, family-friendly clay workshop inspired by York’s rivers, flooding history, and climate resilience. In this hands-on workshop, participants will create their own unique air-dry clay fish — a “river messenger” carrying stories, memories, and imagined journeys fro
item.location: Rowntree Park, Rowntree Park Lodge, Richardson St, York YO23 1JU

item.title: Opera North: Little Listeners at the NCEM – Mini Magic Flute
item.description: Take the family on a magical musical journey inspired by Mozart's beloved opera, The Magic Flute. A trio of opera singers and an accordionist bring to life a Prince's quest to find a Princess, where nothing is quite what it seems! Meet a cast of fantastical characters, from a charming bird-catcher to a fearsome dragon,
item.location: National Centre for Early Music (NCEM), St Margaret’s Church York YO1 9TL
item.ify:location: National Centre for Early Music (NCEM), St Margaret’s Church York YO1 9TL
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings

item.title: Betfred 250th St Leger Festival | St Leger Day
item.description: The most historic race. The most historic party. Celebrating 250 Years of the World's Oldest Classic 2026 marks a huge milestone in British racing history, the 250th anniversary of the first running of the Betfred St Leger Stakes, which first took place all the way back in 1776. Capital Breakfast host DJ Jordan North w
item.location: Doncaster Racecourse, The Grandstand Leger Way, Doncaster, South Yorkshire, DN2 6BB
item.ify:location: Doncaster Racecourse, The Grandstand Leger Way, Doncaster, South Yorkshire, DN2 6BB
item.dc:creator: Visit Doncaster

item.title: Family Friendly
item.description: We’ve put together a busy schedule of events for all ages, covering arts and culture, live events in Doncaster, sport, shopping, eating, and drinking.
item.location: coming back for more. Doncaster really does have it all! Tourist Information Centre 1 Priory Place Doncaster DN1 1BL
item.ify:location: coming back for more. Doncaster really does have it all! Tourist Information Centre 1 Priory Place Doncaster DN1 1BL
item.dc:creator: Visit Doncaster
